extract.name: Volume Anomaly + Whale Accumulation + Tokenomics Event
extract.reasoning: Four signals converged in sequence before MORPHO's +81% move: a token unlock shifted supply expectations (day -14), then volume spiked 2-3x (day -11 to -7), followed by a $21M whale transfer and DEX surge on the same day (day -9). Each phase logically triggers the next. Backtested at 56% hit rate with 11.1x lift.

extract.name: Volume Surge + KOL Discovery + Tokenomics Event
extract.reasoning: Classic 'smart money front-runs retail' sequence before VIRTUAL's +830% rally. DEX volume surged on day -10 as early participants accumulated, then a high-signal KOL posted the first analysis on day 0 and sentiment flipped positive. 68 total signals detected — exceptionally high density. Validates at 4.1x lift.

extract.name: Catalyst + Volume Surge + Sentiment Shift
extract.reasoning: A catalyst-first pattern: high-strength news events (protocol upgrades) appeared throughout the lookback window, with sustained DEX volume confirming real demand. Social sentiment shifted on breakout day. Only 3 conditions — intentionally tight for higher match quality. Validates at 4.1x lift.
